name: A New Trust Was Created To A Domain
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke
SIGMA Title: A New Trust Was Created To A Domain
SIGMA Description: Addition of domains is seldom and should be verified for legitimacy.

False positives:
- Legitimate extension of domain structure
